sub_pixel_system.notes: Pinball game; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Pinball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Game is arcade-style pinball with four themed tables (Party Land, Speed Devils, Billion Dollar Gameshow, Stones 'N Bones). Each table features ramps, targets, bumpers, and mode sequences. Physics governed by pinball table mechanics rather than traditional character movement.

physics_values.extra_ball_trigger: exceeding highest score on list or winning final match
physics_values.scoring_mechanism: ramp shots, target banks, mode sequences

tier_notes: Tier 3: Pinball Fantasies is a pinball simulation game, not a traditional platformer. No character movement, gravity, or jump physics apply. Documentation covers gameplay mechanics and table design but contains no physics parameters for movement systems. SNES version released February 1995 by GameTek/Spidersoft; uses same music as Amiga version with limited color palette.
